titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Green Family Collection of Volvelles
titlestmt.author: compiled by Adrienne Pruitt and Chris Cole.

publicationstmt.publisher: Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library Special Collections

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library Special Collections

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday May 22, 2026 at 19:00

did.unittitle: Green Family collection of volvelles

corpname.part: Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library Special Collections

did.abstract: Contains volvelles, slide charts, and a small numbers of reference works collected by the Green family on topics including advertising, geography, and language.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains volvelles and slide charts primarily collected by Norma Fay Green's father, George Warren Green, on topics including advertising, geography, and language. The collection also includes a limited amount of reference material, and materials contributed by other Green family memembers.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arrangement follows the organization identified by the donor. Organized into five series: I. Advertising, circa 1940s-1994; II. Geography, 1931-1977; III. Language, 1933-1981; IV. Slide Charts, 1960-1996; V. Reference Works, 1993-2023.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Green Family collection of volvelles, Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library, Yale University.
